revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ahachino Shrine (Q135229657)
| native_name = 阿波遅神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ahachino Shrine (Q135229657)
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ahachino Shrine'''|阿波遅神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|gōshi|lt=gōshi|ja|合祀|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Nakatomi Itate Shrine|lt=Nakatomi Itate Shrine|ja|中臣印達神社|qid=Q17226544|1=Nakatomi Itate Shrine}}
** Series ordinal: 15

== followed by (P156) ==

* {{ill|Q135041153|ltq=Q135041153|qid=Q135041153|1=Nakatomiitateno Shrine}}

[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ahachino Shrine (Q135229657)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ahachino Shrine (Q135229657)]][[Category:gōshi]]
